title: Debate response
subtitle: Respond to an opponent’s point.
overview: A good response quotes the idea, then answers it.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: El problema de ese razonamiento es...
The problem with that reasoning is...

items.es: Has mencionado que el coste sería demasiado alto.
items.en: You mentioned that the cost would be too high.

items.es: Ese punto es válido, pero no debemos mirar solo el coste inicial.
items.en: That point is valid, but we should not look only at the initial cost.

items.es: El problema de ese razonamiento es que ignora los beneficios a largo plazo.
items.en: The problem with that reasoning is that it ignores long-term benefits.

items.es: Mi alternativa sería empezar con un programa pequeño y evaluarlo.
items.en: My alternative would be to start with a small program and evaluate it.

items.es: Así reduciríamos el riesgo sin abandonar la idea.
items.en: This way we would reduce the risk without abandoning the idea.
